mission.title: keda: Add Apache Pulsar Scaler
mission.description:
_Provide a description of what has been changed_

### Checklist

- [x] Commits are signed with Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO - [learn more](https://github.com/kedacore/keda/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin-signing-your-work))
- [x] Tests have been added
- [ ] A PR is opened to update our Helm chart ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/charts)) *(if applicable, ie. when deployment manifests are modified)*
- [x] A PR is opened to update the documentation on ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs)) *(if applicable)*
- [ ] Changelog has been updated and is aligned with our [changelog requirements](https://github.com/kedacore/keda/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#Changelog)

Fixes #853 

This PR is base on #1666

doc PR --> https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/761

resolution.summary:
> Whant can i do for it and how can i check it myself, thanks!

hey @liangyuanpeng ,
Thanks a ton for this new scaler! ❤️ ❤️ 
That specific CI only passes if e2e tests have passed. (it's a new mechanism that we have introduced to block PRs without e2e test). It's not mandatory because we can add the label manually if the PR doesn't need them.
In this case, talking about new scaler, it'd be nice if you can [add some e2e tests](https://github.com/kedacore/keda/tree/main/tests/scalers).
BTW, [there is other CI failing](https://github.com/kedacore/keda/runs/6439328615?check_suite_focus=true) that requires changes in the code. Basically you should sort alphabetically the scalers in `scale_handler.go` and some code fixes
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets: Error: Label check failed: required any of ok-to-merge, but found 0.
